로마서 6:1.content: What shall we say then? Shall we continue in sin, that grace may abound?

로마서 6:2.content: May it never be! We who died to sin, how could we live in it any longer?

로마서 6:3.content: Or don’t you know that all we who were baptized into Christ Jesus were baptized into his death?

로마서 6:4.content: We were buried therefore with him through baptism into death, that just as Christ was raised from the dead through the glory of the Father, so we also might walk in newness of life.

로마서 6:5.content: For if we have become united with him in the likeness of his death, we will also be part of his resurrection;

로마서 6:6.content: knowing this, that our old man was crucified with him, that the body of sin might be done away with, so that we would no longer be in bondage to sin.

로마서 6:7.content: For he who has died has been freed from sin.

로마서 6:8.content: But if we died with Christ, we believe that we will also live with him;

로마서 6:9.content: knowing that Christ, being raised from the dead, dies no more. Death no longer has dominion over him!

로마서 6:10.content: For the death that he died, he died to sin one time; but the life that he lives, he lives to God.

로마서 6:11.content: Thus consider yourselves also to be dead to sin, but alive to God in Christ Jesus our Lord.

로마서 6:12.content: Therefore don’t let sin reign in your mortal body, that you should obey it in its lusts.

로마서 6:13.content: Also, do not present your members to sin as instruments of unrighteousness, but present yourselves to God as alive from the dead, and your members as instruments of righteousness to God.

로마서 6:14.content: For sin will not have dominion over you. For you are not under law, but under grace.

로마서 6:15.content: What then? Shall we sin, because we are not under law, but under grace? May it never be!

로마서 6:16.content: Don’t you know that when you present yourselves as servants and obey someone, you are the servants of whomever you obey; whether of sin to death, or of obedience to righteousness?

로마서 6:17.content: But thanks be to God, that, whereas you were bondservants of sin, you became obedient from the heart to that form of teaching to which you were delivered.

로마서 6:18.content: Being made free from sin, you became bondservants of righteousness.

로마서 6:19.content: I speak in human terms because of the weakness of your flesh, for as you presented your members as servants to uncleanness and to wickedness upon wickedness, even so now present your members as servants to righteousness for sanctification.

로마서 6:20.content: For when you were servants of sin, you were free from righteousness.

로마서 6:21.content: What fruit then did you have at that time in the things of which you are now ashamed? For the end of those things is death.

로마서 6:22.content: But now, being made free from sin and having become servants of God, you have your fruit of sanctification and the result of eternal life.

로마서 6:23.content: For the wages of sin is death, but the free gift of God is eternal life in Christ Jesus our Lord.
